title: Senior Cloud Developer-Azure
skills: azure, Devops, Kubernetes, Terraform, Python, Ci/Cd, Golang, Cloud
match_reason: Strong match for a Senior Azure Cloud/DevOps role: excellent overlap in Azure, Kubernetes, Terraform, CI/CD, GitOps, Python, and cloud automation; title and 11-year experience fit well; remote location aligns; main drawbacks are undisclosed salary, IT services company type, and some missing explicit Azure/AWS mandatory items.

title: Senior Manager -IT Cloud
skills: vmware, OpenStack, Kubernetes, Storage, docker, WS, Azure, VMware vCloud Director, Kubeflow, MLflow, Argo Workflows, KServe, NVIDIA CUDA, PyTorch, Ten
match_reason: Strong match on Kubernetes, Terraform, Docker, GitOps, Linux, automation, and cloud operations with 11 years’ experience, but the role is onsite in Noida, more operations-heavy and OpenStack/data-center focused than Azure/AWS DevOps, and salary is undisclosed so ₹80 LPA is uncertain.

title: Lead SRE - AI Platforms
skills: Site Reliability Engineering, Cloud, Mlops, Devops, Artificial Intelligence
match_reason: Strong match on SRE/DevOps, Kubernetes, Terraform, CI/CD, cloud, and scripting with 11 years’ experience; title and level fit well, Bangalore hybrid is acceptable, but salary is undisclosed and the AI/MLOps focus is only a partial match.

title: Senior/Lead AWS Solution Architect
skills: AWS Cloud, Solution Architect, Cloud Architecture, Kubernetes, EC2, VPC, RDS., Ci/Cd, Gitlab, Docker
match_reason: Strong match for AWS/Kubernetes/Terraform/CI/CD and senior cloud architecture scope; title and 8-11 YOE fit well, Bangalore location is acceptable, but salary is undisclosed and Azure depth is not central, so it’s a good but not perfect fit.
